film.title: Kuch Khatti Kuch Meethi
film.overview: This story revolves around the lives of two look-alike sisters, who are brought up separately by their estranged parents, who had separated due to a misunderstandings when the girls were little. The twins meet, find out about their backgrounds, and decide to switch places

dialogues.dialogue: Why don't you get him married off? - Who will marry him? For money's sake, anyone will do anything. We have to hire a woman I'm ashamed, you're my daughter I never imagined you'd be drinking! Shameless you! Instead of being ashamed, you're smiling!
I'm ashamed, you're my daughter I never imagined you'd be drinking! Shameless you! Instead of being ashamed, you're smiling! Don't you ever talk to me again! No, I'm not going to forgive you!
Some bitter Some sweet I'm a bit of a tomboy - I'm a bit shamefaced Still it looks as if you and I are just the same Some bitter

Why? - Raj is becoming a father again Yes Raj. Savitri is pregnant You should be ashamed! You're still spawning? You ought to be giving your daughters away in marriage! I don't remember...Savitri, is it mine?
dialogues.cause_raw: Having more children than socially acceptable
